companies.products_and_services: Microfinance, digital financial services, micro-lending, savings, insurance, mobile banking, SME lending
companies.it_summary: Core: Temenos T24; Digital: Mobile banking used by ~40% of clients; Upgrades: Cloud migration 2022, New mobile app 2023
Core: Temenos; Digital: Mobile banking available in most markets; Upgrades: Core banking upgrade 2022

Baobab Group.justification: The company's products and services clearly focus on microfinance, micro-lending, and SME lending, aligning perfectly with the target strategy.
The management team includes executives with deep institutional experience from top-tier consulting (BCG) and a major international bank (Société Générale).
Baobab Group is backed by multiple major international Development Finance Institutions (DFIs) such as IFC, EIB, Norfund, and ProParco.
The company utilizes a modern Temenos T24 core banking system, has undergone cloud migration, and shows high digital adoption with a new mobile app.
Baobab Group is positioned as a leading microfinance provider and is among the top 3 in microfinance lending across multiple markets in West Africa.

FINCA International.justification: FINCA International's product offerings are clearly focused on microfinance and SME lending, aligning well with the desired strategy.
The CEO has solid experience as a former executive at TIAA-CREF, indicating a strong professional background.
FINCA International is backed by major international Development Finance Institutions (DFIs) including IFC and OPIC.
FINCA International uses a modern Temenos core banking system and completed a significant upgrade in 2022, with mobile banking available across most markets.
While FINCA International has a strong presence in East Africa and is globally recognized as a top 5 microfinance institution, specific data for being top 1-3 in at least two markets is not provided.

summaries.Baobab Group: Size of Transaction (5), Product / Market Strategy Fit (5), Quality & Depth of Management (5) are key strengths. Contribution to Profitability (4), Ease of Execution (4) are primary discounts. Recommend proceed with enhanced due diligence.
summaries.FINCA International: Size of Transaction (5), Ease of Execution (5), Product / Market Strategy Fit (5) are key strengths. Contribution to Profitability (2), Quality & Depth of Management (3) are primary discounts. Recommend proceed with enhanced due diligence.
